question: Beej kya hai
answer: Beej nayi fasal ka starting planting material hota hai. Healthy aur certified beej use karoge to germination, uniform growth, aur disease tolerance zyada better milti hai.

question: Fertilizer kya hai
answer: Fertilizer ya khad wo input hota hai jo crop ko zaruri nutrients, jaise nitrogen, phosphorus, aur potash deta hai. Sahi fertilizer crop stage aur soil test ke hisab se choose karna best rehta hai.

question: Irrigation kya hai
answer: Irrigation ya sinchai ka matlab crop ko planned tarike se paani dena hota hai. Iska goal root zone me required moisture maintain rakhna hota hai bina waterlogging ke.

question: Mere leaf yellow ho rahe hai
answer: Agar patte yellow ho rahe hain to nitrogen ya micronutrient deficiency, ya kabhi kabhi root stress ho sakta hai. Waterlogging check karo, halka balanced NPK ya recommended foliar nutrient do, aur agar veins green rahen to zinc ya iron deficiency bhi inspect karo.

question: Leaf pe brown spots aa gaye
answer: Brown spots aksar fungal leaf spot ya blight ka sign hote hain. Infected leaves ko alag karo, upar se paani dena avoid karo, aur labelled fungicide ko crop ke hisab se use karo.

question: Leaf curl ho raha hai
answer: Leaf curl me whitefly, thrips ya virus ka role ho sakta hai. Neeche ki side pests check karo, neem oil ya recommended insecticide use karo, aur heavily infected plants ko alag rakhna better hota hai.

question: Plant suk raha hai
answer: Plant sukhna sirf paani ki kami nahi hoti; root damage, wilt disease ya heat stress bhi reason ho sakta hai. Mitti ki moisture, root zone aur stem base check karo, phir hi irrigation ya treatment decide karo.

question: Plant grow nahi kar raha
answer: Slow growth me poor soil fertility, root stress, low sunlight ya wrong irrigation schedule ho sakta hai. Compost, balanced fertilizer aur proper drainage ke saath crop stage ke hisab se nutrition plan rakho.

question: Pest aa gaya hai
answer: Pest aane par pehle ye dekho ki sucking pest hai ya chewing pest, kyunki treatment alag hota hai. Neem oil, sticky traps aur threshold-based spray se start karo; bina identification ke heavy chemical spray avoid karo.

question: White powder leaf pe hai
answer: Patte par white powder jaisa layer powdery mildew ho sakta hai. Air circulation improve karo, zyada humidity avoid karo, aur sulfur based ya crop-labelled fungicide spray timely karo.

question: Leaf me holes hai
answer: Leaf holes zyadatar caterpillar, beetle ya chewing insect ke attack me dikhte hain. Early morning inspection karo, egg clusters hatao, aur zarurat ho to recommended insecticide ya bio-control use karo.

question: Root black ho raha hai
answer: Root black ya soft ho raha ho to root rot ya waterlogging ka risk hota hai. Drainage improve karo, extra irrigation rok do, aur soil-borne disease management ke liye field sanitation rakho.

question: Soil dry hai
answer: Mitti dry ho to ekdum flood irrigation dene ke bajay measured watering karo taaki root shock na aaye. Mulch use karoge to moisture zyada der tak hold rahega.

question: Kitna pani dena chahiye
answer: Paani ki matra crop, soil type aur growth stage par depend karti hai. Sandy soil me thoda-thoda frequent paani do, aur heavy soil me interval badha kar moisture check ke saath irrigation karo.

question: Zyada pani dene se kya hota hai
answer: Zyada paani se root zone me oxygen kam ho jati hai, jisse root rot, yellowing aur fungal problem badh sakti hai. Field me pani ruk raha ho to drainage aur irrigation interval dono improve karo.

question: Kam pani dene se kya hota hai
answer: Kam paani se plant stress me chala jata hai, leaves droop kar sakte hain aur growth ya flowering slow ho sakti hai. Moisture ko regular interval par monitor karke hi next irrigation do.

question: Irrigation system kaunsa best hai
answer: Drip irrigation sabse efficient hota hai jab water saving aur targeted root watering chahiye ho. Sprinkler broad coverage ke liye useful hai, lekin disease-prone crops me leaf wetness ka dhyan rakho.

question: Best fertilizer kya hai
answer: Sabse best fertilizer wahi hota hai jo soil test aur crop stage ke hisab se fit baithe. Generic taur par balanced NPK useful hota hai, lekin blind urea ya random mix dena har field me sahi nahi hota.

question: Fertilizer kab dale
answer: Fertilizer ko sowing ke time basal dose aur baad me crop stage ke hisab se split dose me dena better hota hai. Ek hi baar zyada quantity dene se nutrient loss aur plant burn dono ho sakte hain.

question: Fertilizer zyada dal diya
answer: Agar fertilizer zyada pad gaya hai to turant aur fertilizer mat do aur light irrigation se excess salts ko dilute karne ki koshish karo. Leaf burn ya wilting dikh rahi ho to dose record check karo aur next application delay karo.

question: Plant jal gaya hai
answer: Plant burn fertilizer overdose, strong spray concentration ya heat stress se ho sakta hai. Spray concentration review karo, midday application avoid karo, aur affected plants ko recovery ke liye gentle irrigation do.

question: Organic farming kaise kare
answer: Organic farming ke liye compost, well-decomposed manure, neem-based pest control aur crop rotation ka combo use karo. Certification ya market target ho to input record maintain karna bhi important hota hai.

question: Soil kaise improve kare
answer: Soil improve karne ke liye compost, crop residue management, green manure aur rotation ka use karo. Sirf chemical input par depend karne ke bajay organic matter badhane par focus rakho.

question: Soil test kaise kare
answer: Soil test ke liye field ke alag-alag points se sample lo, mix karo aur clean sample lab ya kit me bhejo. Report ke bina fertilizer plan banana aksar wasteful hota hai.

question: pH kaise check kare
answer: pH meter ya reliable soil testing kit se pH check kar sakte ho. pH bahut low ya high ho to nutrient uptake disturb hota hai, isliye fertilizer recommendation bhi pH ke saath dekhni chahiye.

question: Seed kab lagaye
answer: Beej lagane ka sahi time crop, region aur weather forecast par depend karta hai. Late sowing se pest, heat ya yield loss ka risk badh sakta hai, isliye local season window follow karo.

question: Pesticide kab use kare
answer: Pesticide tab use karo jab pest threshold cross ho ya infestation clearly confirm ho. Subah ya shaam spray karo, label dose follow karo, aur hawa ya barish ke time spray mat karo.

question: Rice me kaunsi bimari hoti hai
answer: Rice me blast, bacterial leaf blight aur sheath blight common problems hoti hain. Exact disease symptom, weather aur crop stage dekhkar hi spray choose karna chahiye.

question: Tomato me disease
answer: Tomato me early blight, late blight, leaf curl virus aur leaf mold common hote hain. Spots, curl aur underside growth jaise symptoms dekhkar diagnosis karna zyada accurate rehta hai.

question: Wheat me problem
answer: Wheat me yellow rust, leaf rust aur kabhi nutrient deficiency common dikh sakti hai. Orange ya yellow pustules hon to rust suspect karo; warna nutrient pattern bhi inspect karo.

question: Leaf ka color change ho raha hai
answer: Leaf color change deficiency, water stress ya disease tino ki wajah se ho sakta hai. Pattern dekho: pura patta yellow hai, veins green hain, ya sirf edges burn ho rahe hain; isi se next diagnosis clear hota hai.

question: Plant weak hai
answer: Weak plant me nutrition, root health, sunlight aur pest pressure sab check karna chahiye. Sirf fertilizer badhane ke bajay overall field condition dekhna zyada useful hota hai.

question: Crop yield kaise badhaye
answer: Yield badhane ke liye seed quality, balanced nutrition, timely irrigation aur early pest scouting sab saath me kaam karte hain. Ek hi factor improve karke maximum output nahi milta.

question: Best pesticide kya hai
answer: Best pesticide pest ke type par depend karta hai; har pest ke liye same product sahi nahi hota. Mild infestation me neem oil ya bio option se start karo, aur heavy case me crop-labelled pesticide choose karo.

question: Chemical fertilizer safe hai
answer: Chemical fertilizer controlled dose me safe hota hai, lekin overuse se soil imbalance, salt stress aur lodging ka risk badhta hai. Soil test aur split dose follow karna best rehta hai.

question: Crop disease kaise detect kare
answer: Disease detect karne ke liye symptom pattern, leaf side, stem impact aur recent weather sab dekhna chahiye. Photo-based AI detection helpful hai, lekin exact spray se pehle symptom confirm karna aur bhi zaruri hai.

question: Kaunsa crop ugaye
answer: Crop selection climate, water availability, soil type aur market demand ke combination par hona chahiye. Sirf mandi rate dekhkar crop choose karne se production risk badh sakta hai.

question: Best seeds kaunse hai
answer: Best seed wahi hai jo certified ho, local climate me perform karta ho aur disease tolerance rakhta ho. Har jagah hybrid hi best ho yeh zaruri nahi; kabhi resilient variety zyada useful hoti hai.

question: Farm management kaise kare
answer: Farm management me irrigation, fertilizer, spray aur labour ka simple record rakhna bahut useful hota hai. Planned schedule aur field observation se cost control aur timely action dono improve hote hain.

question: Weather ka impact kya hai
answer: Weather ka direct effect germination, flowering, pest pressure aur disease spread par padta hai. High humidity fungal disease badhati hai aur heat stress se pollination aur growth dono affect ho sakte hain.

question: Farming me profit kaise badhaye
answer: Profit badhane ke liye sirf yield nahi, input cost aur selling timing bhi optimize karna padta hai. Seed, fertilizer aur spray ko need-based rakho aur mandi trend dekhkar sale plan karo.

question: Modern farming kya hai
answer: Modern farming ka matlab data, machines, sensors aur better planning ke saath kheti karna hai. Isme productivity ke saath resource saving par bhi focus hota hai.

question: Greenhouse kya hai
answer: Greenhouse ya protected cultivation me temperature, humidity aur crop environment ko better control kiya ja sakta hai. High value vegetables aur nursery plants ke liye yeh useful hota hai.

question: Hydroponics kya hai
answer: Hydroponics me crop ko soil ke bina nutrient solution me grow kiya jata hai. Isme management accurate hona chahiye, kyunki pH aur nutrient balance ka control bahut important hota hai.

question: Kheti me AI ka use
answer: AI weather risk, crop health, pest alert aur input planning me help karta hai. Sahi data ke saath AI farmer ko faster aur better decision support de sakta hai.

question: Smart farming kya hai
answer: Smart farming me AI, IoT sensors, automation aur data-based decisions ka use hota hai. Iska goal paani, fertilizer aur labour ko optimize karke better output lena hai.

question: Weather kya hai
answer: Weather ya mausam ka matlab kisi jagah ka short-term temperature, hawa, badal, barish, aur humidity condition hota hai. Farming me weather samajhna important hai kyunki isi se irrigation, spray, sowing aur harvest timing decide hoti hai.

question: Humidity kya hoti hai
answer: Humidity hawa me maujood moisture ya nami ko bolte hain. High humidity se fungal disease aur leaf wetness risk badhta hai, jabki low humidity me crop me water stress aur transpiration pressure badh sakta hai.

question: Rain report kya hota hai
answer: Rain report ya rainfall report batata hai ki kitni barish hui, kab hui, aur kab expected ho sakti hai. Farmer ke liye yeh irrigation planning, spray timing, drainage, aur field entry decision me useful hota hai.

question: Weather forecast kya hota hai
answer: Weather forecast future ke mausam ka andaza hota hai, jaise barish, temperature, hawa, ya humidity ka probable pattern. Forecast ko exact guarantee nahi samajhna chahiye, par farming planning ke liye yeh strong guidance deta hai.

question: Soil kya hoti hai
answer: Soil ya mitti wo natural medium hai jisme crop roots grow karti hain aur water, air, aur nutrients leti hain. Achhi soil structure, organic matter, aur drainage crop growth ko directly support karte hain.

question: Soil moisture kya hota hai
answer: Soil moisture mitti me available paani ki quantity ko bolte hain jo roots use kar sakti hain. Isko samajhne se irrigation sahi time par hoti hai aur overwatering ya underwatering dono se bachne me madad milti hai.

question: Soil type kaise samjhe
answer: Basic level par soil ko sandy, clayey, ya loamy type me samjha ja sakta hai. Sandy soil jaldi dry hoti hai, clay soil pani zyada rok sakti hai, aur loamy soil balance ke liye generally best mani jati hai.

question: Pest kya hota hai
answer: Pest wo organism hota hai jo crop ko nuksan pahunchata hai, jaise aphid, whitefly, caterpillar, ya borer. Har pest insect nahi hota, lekin farming me zyada tar visible pest insect attack ke roop me milte hain.

question: Disease kya hoti hai crop me
answer: Crop disease ya bimari tab hoti hai jab fungus, bacteria, virus, ya kabhi adverse environment ki wajah se plant ka normal growth system disturb ho jata hai. Symptoms me spots, rot, curl, yellowing, wilting, ya stunted growth dikh sakta hai.

question: Pest aur disease me difference kya hai
answer: Pest me aam taur par keede ya visible feeding damage milta hai, jaise holes, sucking marks, ya insects leaf ke niche. Disease me fungal, bacterial, ya viral symptoms milte hain, jaise spots, rot, powder layer, wilt, ya mosaic pattern.

question: Fertilizer kitne type ke hote hai
answer: Broadly fertilizer organic, chemical, aur bio-input category me samjhe ja sakte hain. Organic sources compost aur manure dete hain, chemical fertilizers fast nutrients dete hain, aur bio-fertilizers nutrient availability ko support karte hain.

question: Urea aur NPK me difference kya hai
answer: Urea mainly nitrogen source hota hai, jabki NPK fertilizer me nitrogen, phosphorus, aur potash ka combination hota hai. Agar blindly sirf urea diya jaye to crop ko baaki nutrients kam mil sakte hain, isliye balanced plan better hota hai.

question: Barish ke baad kya check kare
answer: Barish ke baad field me waterlogging, leaf damage, stem lodging, aur pest ya disease flare-up check karo. Agar field me pani ruk gaya hai to drainage improve karo aur spray ka decision leaf dryness aur weather gap dekhkar lo.

question: Temperature kya hota hai farming me
answer: Temperature se pata chalta hai ki hawa ya environment kitna garam ya thanda hai. Crop growth, germination, flowering, pollination, aur disease pressure sab temperature se directly affect hote hain.

question: Rainfall kya hota hai
answer: Rainfall ka matlab kisi period me hui total barish se hota hai, jise usually millimeter me measure kiya jata hai. Yeh irrigation need, drainage risk, nutrient leaching, aur disease spread samajhne me useful hota hai.

question: Wind ka effect crop par kya hai
answer: Tez hawa se young plants gir sakte hain, transpiration badh sakti hai, aur spray drift bhi hota hai. Lekin halki air movement canopy ko dry rakhne me help karti hai, jo kuch fungal problems ko kam kar sakti hai.

question: Compost kya hota hai
answer: Compost decomposed organic material hota hai jo soil structure, microbial activity, aur moisture holding capacity improve karta hai. Yeh instant chemical fertilizer jaisa fast effect nahi deta, par long-term soil health ke liye bahut useful hota hai.

question: Bio fertilizer kya hota hai
answer: Bio-fertilizer me useful microorganisms hote hain jo nutrient availability improve karte hain, jaise nitrogen fixation ya phosphorus solubilization. Yeh chemical fertilizer ka direct full replacement nahi hota, par nutrient efficiency improve kar sakta hai.

question: Fungicide kya hota hai
answer: Fungicide wo crop protection spray hota hai jo fungal diseases ko prevent ya control karne ke liye use hota hai. Har spot ya leaf problem me fungicide sahi ho yeh zaruri nahi, isliye disease type pehle samajhna important hai.

question: Insecticide kya hota hai
answer: Insecticide pest insects ko control karne ke liye use hota hai. Agar problem fungal disease hai aur aap insecticide use karoge to result nahi milega, isliye pest aur disease ka difference samajhna zaruri hai.

question: Weed kya hota hai
answer: Weed ya kharpatwar wo unwanted plants hote hain jo crop ke saath nutrients, water, light, aur space ke liye compete karte hain. Early stage me weed control na ho to yield aur input efficiency dono gir sakte hain.

question: Waterlogging kya hota hai
answer: Waterlogging tab hoti hai jab field ya root zone me pani zyada der tak ruk jata hai aur roots ko oxygen kam milti hai. Isse root rot, yellowing, nutrient imbalance, aur plant decline ka risk badh jata hai.

question: Drainage kyu important hai
answer: Drainage field se extra pani ko bahar nikalne me help karta hai. Achha drainage root zone ko aerated rakhta hai, waterlogging rokta hai, aur especially rainy season me disease pressure ko kam kar sakta hai.

question: Soil pH kyu important hai
answer: Soil pH nutrient availability ko control karta hai. Agar pH bahut low ya high ho to crop ko nutrients soil me hone ke baad bhi properly nahi milte, isliye fertilizer recommendation ko pH ke saath dekhna chahiye.

question: Spray barish se pehle kare ya baad me
answer: Heavy rain expected ho to spray avoid karna better hota hai, kyunki chemical wash off ho sakta hai aur cost waste hoti hai. Rain ke baad tab spray karo jab leaves mostly dry ho jayein aur agla weather window thoda stable dikhe.

question: High humidity me kya kare
answer: High humidity me canopy ventilation, spacing, aur leaf wetness monitoring bahut important ho jati hai. Is weather me fungal disease risk badhta hai, isliye preventive scouting aur over-irrigation avoid karna useful rehta hai.

question: Crop scouting kya hota hai
answer: Crop scouting ka matlab field ko regular interval par dekhkar pest, disease, nutrient stress, aur irrigation issues jaldi identify karna hota hai. Early scouting se spray aur fertilizer decision zyada accurate aur cost-effective bante hain.
